summary: Live text and image usage display contracts now require Codex OAuth-shaped image confirmation with apiKeyRequired false and confirmation evidence bound to the same provider job, Lane D shows real image latency/count display, and non-image generate-stage text usage no longer triggers image billing blockers, but no packaged-app run has captured the pre-generation Codex OAuth image usage confirmation JSON from the same run.
